title: White Hearts
body: This resource pack only changes the hearts in the gui. It does not change other elements.![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07d7ac9825333c08b0a36e472c25b2111e1d44fe.png)![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/700d0314376f5d0c3ab3d8107a489bf2f1e4628a.png)
